pages.raw_text:
A victim Of the murderous wreck
on the Northern Pacific died at the
Sacred Heart hospital yesterday noon.
He was the Italian section hand who
was injured in the wreck of the
North Coast Limited, about which
representatives of the Northern Pa
cifc declared 1t made no difference
to the public how many people the
Northern Pacific railroad killed.


As the man who died yesterday is
an unknown Italian, with no friends
or relatives in America SO far as
known, the railroad company appar-
emily deems itself correct in announce
ing that II is none Of the public's s
business how many are killed in such
frightful wrecks as that of the North
Coast Limited.


The unknown section hand was
taken to the hospital Saturday. He
was standing alongside the track
against the bank when the heavy ex-
press train left the rails near Lind
and was crushed between the cars
and the bank.


The wreck still cumbers the tracks
near Lind and the railway officials
are still doing their best to convince
the public that the deaths and the
wounding of the passengers Is none
of the public's business.
